title: The Global Speaker
tagline: Master the Stage. Command the Screen.
description: This three-tier program is the definitive training suite for professionals operating in a hybrid, international landscape. We move beyond "public speaking" to develop Bimodal Fluency: the ability to transition seamlessly between the physical boardroom and the virtual frame.

levels.title: Foundations of Presence
levels.focus: Transitioning from functional to credible. (Breaking the ice, building trust, and basic value-propositions.)

work_ready_drill.name: The 60-Second Hook
work_ready_drill.description: Mastering the "Ice Breaker" for interviews and networking.

work_ready_drill.name: The Rule of Three
work_ready_drill.description: Organizing complex updates so they are "skim-listenable."

work_ready_drill.name: The BLUF Update
work_ready_drill.description: Delivering the Bottom Line Up Front under strict time limits.

work_ready_drill.name: The Mic/Room Reset
work_ready_drill.description: Adjusting tone for USB mics vs. large conference halls.

work_ready_drill.name: The Frame-Box Check
work_ready_drill.description: Scaling gestures to fit the webcam vs. the stage.

work_ready_drill.name: The Data Spotlight
work_ready_drill.description: Translating one complex chart into a clear, spoken insight.

work_ready_drill.name: The Dual-Focus Slide
work_ready_drill.description: Navigating a deck while maintaining audience engagement.

work_ready_drill.name: The Soft Sell
work_ready_drill.description: Moving a peer from "No" to "Yes" using logical triggers.

work_ready_drill.name: The Team Town Hall
work_ready_drill.description: Delivering a 3-minute "State of the Project" address.

levels.title: Strategic Influence
levels.focus: Commanding high-stakes, unpredictable environments. (Advanced deal-making, handling "tough" negotiators, and storytelling for ROI.)

work_ready_drill.name: The Rapid Q&A
work_ready_drill.description: Handling "cold calls" and unexpected executive questions.

work_ready_drill.name: The Power Play
work_ready_drill.description: Using silence and posture to command a room's attention.

work_ready_drill.name: The ROI Story
work_ready_drill.description: Turning a quarterly spreadsheet into a compelling success tale.

work_ready_drill.name: The Bridge Technique
work_ready_drill.description: Managing "sticky" participants without losing face.

work_ready_drill.name: The Scarcity Pitch
work_ready_drill.description: Leveraging social proof to close a high-value deal.

work_ready_drill.name: The Promotion Panel
work_ready_drill.description: Articulating your "Global Value" to a hiring committee.

work_ready_drill.name: The Moderator's Guide
work_ready_drill.description: Managing dominant vs. quiet voices in a meeting.

work_ready_drill.name: The LinkedIn Video
work_ready_drill.description: Scripting and filming a professional 90-second update.

work_ready_drill.name: The 20-Minute Master
work_ready_drill.description: Building a repeatable talk for industry conferences.

levels.title: The Executive Voice
levels.focus: Global thought leadership and systemic impact. (Multi-party summits, crisis mediation, and high-stakes boardroom negotiations.)

work_ready_drill.name: The Press Statement
work_ready_drill.description: Delivering clear, calm info during a company failure.

work_ready_drill.name: The Briefing Note
work_ready_drill.description: Designing a speech for a CEO or Senior VP.

work_ready_drill.name: The Global Summit
work_ready_drill.description: Navigating a 4-person panel with diverse viewpoints.

work_ready_drill.name: The Podcast Sprint
work_ready_drill.description: Mastering the 15-minute high-energy audio interview.

work_ready_drill.name: The Cross-Border Pitch
work_ready_drill.description: Adjusting humor and idioms for a global audience.

work_ready_drill.name: The Investor Pitch
work_ready_drill.description: Storytelling for shareholders and capital funding.

work_ready_drill.name: The Value Defense
work_ready_drill.description: Standing firm on company ethics during a hard negotiation.

work_ready_drill.name: The Training Blueprint
work_ready_drill.description: Designing a 1-day internal skill-transfer session.

work_ready_drill.name: The "Big Idea" Talk
work_ready_drill.description: Crafting a TED-style talk to disrupt your industry.

points.name: Bimodal Focus
points.description: We don't just teach you how to stand at a podium; we teach you how to dominate the Virtual Frame (Webcam/Mic) and the Physical Stage (Full-body).

points.name: Zero Jargon
points.description: No "club-style" theory. Only direct, actionable skills for busy adults.

points.name: Scalable Mastery
points.description: A 27-step journey that grows with your career, from your first interview to your first keynote.
